title: Code Review Companion Input
description: Bootstrap parameters for the long-running code-review companion. Subsequent reviews come via inbox `task` messages and don't use this schema.

initialTask.description: Optional first task to perform after boot. If omitted, the agent runs the built-in 'orient' task: read the latest plan tree, summarise where the work stands, then idle waiting for outside messages.

planPath.description: Optional explicit path under docs/plans/ for the orient default to focus on. If omitted, the agent picks the highest-numbered plan folder.

idleBudgetMs.description: Idle window (ms) before self-termination. Default 30 minutes (1800000). Operator should send control:stop before this fires to avoid losing the farewell envelope.
